allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: OHCS E-Library - AI-Powered Knowledge Platform

A complete e-library platform for Ghana''s Office of the Head of Civil Service featuring:

Core Features:
- AI-powered document search and summarization
- Digital document library with PDF viewing
- Community forums for knowledge sharing
- Real-time chat and messaging
- Groups and collaboration spaces
- Gamification with XP, badges, and leaderboards
- News aggregation from Ghana sources
- Comprehensive admin panel

Technical Stack:
- React 18 + TypeScript + Vite 5
- Tailwind CSS with Ghana-themed design system \(Green, Gold, Red, Black Star\)
- Zustand for state management
- React Hook Form + Zod for validation
- Framer Motion for animations
- Cloudflare Workers backend structure

Design Highlights:
- Immersive landing page with floating books and AI network animations
- Light/dark mode toggle with full theme support
- Beautiful glassmorphic auth modals
- Ghana flag color accents throughout
- Responsive design for all screen sizes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix TypeScript config for Cloudflare Pages build

- Remove noEmit from tsconfig.node.json \(conflicts with composite\)
- Add emitDeclarationOnly, declaration, declarationMap instead
- Add dist-node output directory for node config
- Update .gitignore to exclude dist-node

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''https://ohcs-elibrary-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/v1/counselor/sessions/5cbac1f2-b431-45a0-b7c3-68eda6613a53/messages'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Headers @{''X-Anonymous-Id''=''54057f76-5f5f-471d-b151-17970924ed2e''} -Body ''{""content"": ""Hello, I am feeling a bit stressed lately""}'' | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10")
